32194683.title: Duncan Haldane

pageprops.wikibase-shortdesc: Professor of physics at Princeton University

32194683.description: Professor of physics at Princeton University
32194683.extract: Frederick Duncan Michael Haldane  (born 14 September 1951) is a British physicist who is currently the Sherman Fairchild University Professor of Physics at Princeton University. He is a co-recipient of the 2016 Nobel Prize in Physics, along with David J. Thouless and J. Michael Kosterlitz.
